message: How long has it been since Tomo Nii-san disappeared?
The last time I saw him was the day before yesterday.
I should've been more selfish back then.
Every time he leaves, I never know if I'll ever see him again.
I came to Kita High again.
I was hoping to meet Tomo Nii-san again.
But the Nii-san I saw at school was Takuji Nii-san, and then later there was a Yuki-san that I didn't know.
They all look the same, but they're different people.
I've heard that humans are creatures of habit.
Whether it's good or bad, if it happens every day, it just becomes normal.
Maybe that's why, even if I didn't have any reason...
I had a feeling that someday he would go back to normal.

name: Hasaki
message: "Ahahaha... There's no guarantee of that."
Sometimes I even thought he could stay with me forever.

name: Hasaki
message: "I'm not a student here, so he told me not to come to school too much."

name: Hasaki
message: "Well, here goes..."
If I do something Tomo Nii-san told me not to, maybe I'll be able to see him...
Maybe it's silly of me to think that.
Yuki-san bought lunch at the store, so I didn't have anything to deliver.

name: Hasaki
message: "I don't have any real reason to be here... What am I doing?"
I hugged my rabbit.
Its head slumped to the side when I squeezed it.
This doll was larger than I was when I got it from Nii-san, but now it's so small.
So... sometimes I feel like I'm still as small as I was when I got it.
I feel like I'm just one of the rabbit's dreams. Like the life I'm living now is just a dream I had when I was a child.
Even I know that's just one of my delusions, though.
But knowledge and emotion don't always agree.
With its inclined head, the rabbit looked like it was asking me a question.
But I couldn't hear its voice.
Even though it always listened to me.

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh?!"
What? Is someone there?
It was just a quiet sound.
It was almost inaudible. It was more like a disturbance in the air.

name: Hasaki
message: "Ah!"

name: Kimura
message: "Huh?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Who... are you?"

name: Kimura
message: "Oh, uh... Well, uh..."

name: Hasaki
message: "That's a big camera."

name: Kimura
message: "Oh, uh... I'm a landscape photographer..."

name: Hasaki
message: "Oh, is that so?"

name: Kimura
message: "Um... Well then..."

name: Hasaki
message: "Ha!"

name: Kimura
message: "Huh?"

name: Kimura
message: "Aaaahh!"

name: Hasaki
message: "You were taking pictures, weren't you?"

name: Kimura
message: "Ow, ow! You're a martial artist too?! What kind of siblings are you?!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Me too? What does that mean?"

name: Kimura
message: "Ow, ow! You're gonna break it!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Were you... taking pictures of Tomo Nii-san?"

name: Kimura
message: "Tomo Nii-san?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Oh, uh... I mean Takuji Nii-san."

name: Kimura
message: "A-Ahaha... Why would you think I was taking pictures of your brother?
Aaaah, ow, ow!"

name: Hasaki
message: "You know, I heard you mention siblings. I'm not gonna let you go now."

name: Kimura
message: "E-Eek... Sorry, uh... could you loosen your grip a little?"

name: Hasaki
message: "No. You're following Nii-san around, aren't you? Maybe I should break one of your arms just to be safe?"

name: Kimura
message: "Wait, you're scaring me!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Why are you following Nii-san?"

name: Kimura
message: "Uh, well, I'm a landscape photographer, so...
Gyaawawa, ow, oww!"

name: Hasaki
message: "If I push a few more centimeters, I'm sure you know what'll happen to your arm."

name: Kimura
message: "Y-You're a lot scarier than you look. You really are Takuji-kun's sister."

name: Hasaki
message: "You can stop wasting your breath. Tell me why you're following Nii-san."

name: Kimura
message: "U-Um! At first I was investigating the drug problem in today's youth."

name: Hasaki
message: "Drug problem?"

name: Kimura
message: "Yeah, lots of college students grow pot nowadays. My client wanted me to gather material about that."

name: Hasaki
message: "What does that have to do with my brother?"

name: Kimura
message: "Well... he's famous around here. His name came up a lot when I was investigating around here."

name: Hasaki
message: "Why would his name come up?"

name: Kimura
message: "He extorts people and takes their drugs. All the drug dealers around here have noticed him."

name: Kimura
message: Even the yakuza have their hands in drugs, you know? And they're being targeted by some random guy off the street."

name: Hasaki
message: "What did he do?"

name: Kimura
message: "Like I said, he takes drugs away from people."

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh? So he's doing drugs?"

name: Kimura
message: "Ahaha... At first, that's what I thought too. I was sure he was a junkie that needed to feed his habit."

name: Kimura
message: "But after a while I noticed... it was way more than any one person could ever use. I thought maybe he was selling it."

name: Kimura
message: "So I tailed him for a while. It would've made a great article if I had found him stealing drugs from other people and reselling them."

name: Hasaki
message: "So... was he?"

name: Kimura
message: "I was way off the mark. He wasn't selling it at all. He threw them all away."

name: Kimura
message: "Yeah... Why does he do that? It's so dangerous, and there's no real reason for him to do it."

name: Kimura
message: "So I investigated, and I found out about Mamiya Takuji's past."

name: Kimura
message: "And I found a lot of interesting stuff. The White Lotus Association... Your mother was involved with them, right?"

name: Hasaki
message: "So you investigated all that too."

name: Kimura
message: "Yeah. I was reading old news articles about the White Lotus Association, and it said your mother was involved with the cult founder."

name: Hasaki
message: "You're missing the most important part."

name: Kimura
message: "W-Wait! Why do you two both act the same way?! I'm a pacifist! Stop!"

name: Hasaki
message: "We're siblings. We have to protect each other... So I have to eliminate problems before they come up."

name: Kimura
message: "No, no, wait. I don't think it's that simple."

name: Hasaki
message: "What do you mean?"

name: Kimura
message: "Well, the way you're saying it, it sounds like everyone in the world is either trying to help or hurt you."

name: Hasaki
message: "I wouldn't say that."

name: Kimura
message: "So let's just calm down. I know this camera makes me look suspicious, but does that mean I'm trying to hurt you? Does that make me an enemy?"

name: Hasaki
message: "I definitely can't think of you as an ally."

name: Kimura
message: "Gyaaa... I-I told you, you can't just divide the world into enemies and allies."

name: Hasaki
message: "What are you trying to say?"

name: Kimura
message: "There are lots of strange things happening in this school, and you're brother is at the center of it."

name: Hasaki
message: "What? In the school?"

name: Kimura
message: "Yeah, that's right. You didn't know? In the past few days, two students from this school have died."

name: Hasaki
message: "Two students... have died?"

name: Kimura
message: "Yeah. In that short time period, there have been two deaths."

name: Kimura
message: "The first was Shiroyama Tsubasa. He was a third-year student. I saw him buying and selling drugs a few times during my investigation. He liked going out at night and hanging out at clubs, too."

name: Hasaki
message: "What happened to him?"

name: Kimura
message: "He died. It was five days ago, I think. He probably had an accident while he was on drugs. He fell from the school roof."

name: Hasaki
message: "Who was the other?"

name: Kimura
message: "Takashima Zakuro."

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh? T-Takashima Zakuro..."

name: Kimura
message: "Yeah, she was a girl your brother knew. They were seen together several times in the days before she died."

name: Hasaki
message: "How did she die? An accident?"

name: Kimura
message: "No. Didn't you see it on the news?"

name: Hasaki
message: "I don't watch TV much."

name: Kimura
message: "It was pretty sensational, so it got a lot of air time. Takashima and two girls from other schools jumped off an apartment building near Suginomiya station."

name: Hasaki
message: "Two girls from another school? Does that mean it was a suicide?"

name: Kimura
message: "Who knows? There hasn't been an official announcement yet, but it definitely looks like a suicide. They're saying on TV that they probably met online and formed a suicide pact."

name: Hasaki
message: "They met online?"

name: Kimura
message: "Oh, well, they weren't friends before they committed suicide. It's just an inference."

name: Kimura
message: "But I couldn't find any posts they made on any sites about suicide."

name: Kimura
message: "I don't think it was a suicide pact..."

name: Hasaki
message: "Then what do you think it was?"

name: Kimura
message: "I'm not the only one. Some people online have noticed the same thing. Their deaths weren't just a bunch of people meeting up and committing suicide."

name: Hasaki
message: "Some people online?"

name: Kimura
message: "Yeah. We don't have any proof, but there are a lot of people sleuthing around."

name: Hasaki
message: "Sleuthing?"

name: Kimura
message: "Yeah, people on the Internet have a lot of free time, and there are a bunch of people trying to figure out what happened."

name: Kimura
message: "But they're at a dead end. There's one thing they can't investigate."

name: Hasaki
message: "What's that?"

name: Kimura
message: "There's a lot of speculation surrounding this one site..."

name: Kimura
message: "The school's underground message board."

name: Hasaki
message: "Underground message board?"

name: Kimura
message: "Yeah... Well, technically it just means a message board that's not recognized by the school."

name: Kimura
message: "Everyone's talking about it, but only people with an account can see the message board."

name: Hasaki
message: "Um, I don't know much about the Internet, so I'm not sure what you mean."

name: Kimura
message: "You have to get approved by the administrator just to see the message board, and the administrator is pretty strict about who can make an account."

name: Kimura
message: "It's hard for an outsider to see the site at all, and anyone who looks suspicious can get banned in a second."

name: Kimura
message: "Sometimes people get in, and they copy-paste threads onto other forums, or post screenshots."

name: Hasaki
message: "U-Um, I don't know what those words mean..."

name: Kimura
message: "Oh, sorry, that's just net slang. Anyway, a lot of people on the Internet are paying attention. This could turn into a major incident."

name: Hasaki
message: "A major incident?"

name: Kimura
message: "Yeah, Kita High's Shiroyama Tsubasa... and then Takashima Zakuro, Tsukigawa Usami from Ebisugawa High, and Mizuo Ayumi from Seinogawa Girls' all died, and some people think this might just be the beginning."

name: Hasaki
message: "The beginning? You mean..."

name: Kimura
message: "And your brother is at the center of it all."

name: Kimura
message: "Do you know about the prophecy that's supposed to be fulfilled this year?"

name: Hasaki
message: "The world's final day will come... and everything will return to the sky..."

name: Kimura
message: "Apparently, the date carved in Mayan ruins corresponded to the year 2012. Though that's supposed to be in December."

name: Kimura
message: "But several people predicted the world would end on July 20th."

name: Kimura
message: "One of those people was the founder of the White Lotus Association."

name: Hasaki
message: "But the founder retracted his statement. He said he had caused a miracle and avoided the disaster."

name: Kimura
message: "Hehehe... You know all about this, huh? The founder of the White Lotus Association has retracted his statement, but that was seven years ago."

name: Kimura
message: "There are still people who believe in the prophecy."

name: Hasaki
message: "...What are you trying to say?"

name: Kimura
message: "Your mother... Or should I say, your former mother? I heard she got divorced. Her maiden name was Sanami, I believe."

name: Hasaki
message: "She didn't get divorced! Our father died! Her name is still Mamiya Kotomi!"

name: Kimura
message: "Oh, is it now?"

name: Kimura
message: "But... your mother still believes. There's another site on the Internet that's been getting a lot of attention."

name: Hasaki
message: "The website my mother made, right?"

name: Kimura
message: "Yes, the predictions of the Web Bot Project. It still says that the world will end on July 20th, 2012."

name: Kimura
message: "The White Lotus Association denies the prophecy, but she still believes the world is going to end."

name: Hasaki
message: "Haa... You sure did do a good job finding all that out."

name: Kimura
message: "Ow, ow!"

name: Kimura
message: "W-Wait. Even if you beat me up, someone else will find out the truth soon."

name: Kimura
message: "It's not just people online. There are other journalists asking around."

name: Kimura
message: "If anything else happens, the police will probably start investigating too."

name: Kimura
message: "The mistress of the White Lotus Association's founder is running the Web Bot Project!"

name: Kimura
message: "And her son, Mamiya Takuji, is likely at the center of the latest incidents."

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh?"

name: Master
message: "Jeez, the mass media sure is garbage..."

name: Hasaki
message: "Master..."

name: Master
message: "Don't worry, I didn't kill him. I just put him to sleep. Let's bring him back to the shop, instead of talking here."

name: Hasaki
message: "S-Sure..."
Master picked up the self-proclaimed journalist and carried him on his back.

name: Master
message: "So... who is this?"

name: Hasaki
message: "He's a journalist, apparently."

name: Master
message: "A journalist, huh? Well, what should we do with him?"

name: Hasaki
message: "You're always sexually harassing Tomo Nii-san, so why don't you fulfill your urges with this guy?"

name: Kimura
message: "Huh? Huh?! Wait, what do you mean by that?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Exactly what I said."
Master woke him up once we got to the store. It's amazing how he's always perfectly in control of the situation.

name: Master
message: "Hmm... He's not really my type, but...
I do like virgin boys..."

name: Kimura
message: "No, wait, I'm not a virgin... Though I've only done it with prostitutes."

name: Master
message: "Ahahaha... What are you talking about?"

name: Kimura
message: "Ahaha, y-yeah, that's ridiculous."

name: Master
message: "I was talking about your anal virginity. I love showing little straight boys how to walk on the wild side."

name: Kimura
message: "Whoa, w-wait! They stuck their fingers in my ass, so I'm not a virgin there either!"

name: Master
message: "Ahahaha, a girl's fingers can't take away your virginity. You have to get a real man to stick something nice and juicy up there."

name: Kimura
message: "E-Eeeek!"

name: Hasaki
message: "U-Um... Th-That's really nasty."

name: Master
message: "Oh, sorry about that...
So you're a jouranlist, Kimura-san?"

name: Kimura
message: "Huh? H-How do you know my name?"

name: Master
message: "Not just that. I know your address and your phone number too. I searched all your stuff."

name: Kimura
message: "N-No way..."

name: Master
message: "Not like I really care, but why the heck are you toting around this huge camera? You must stand out with this thing."

name: Kimura
message: "Ah, don't touch that. I just got it fixed!"

name: Master
message: "Hmm... So, back to our conversation earlier."

name: Kimura
message: "What do you mean?"

name: Master
message: "You said there were lots of people talking about the incidents at Kita High."

name: Kimura
message: "Well yeah, a lot of crazy stuff went down."

name: Master
message: "Crazy stuff, huh..."

name: Hasaki
message: "He said two people that Nii-san knew have died."

name: Hasaki
message: "And... Mom's site..."

name: Master
message: "I thought that site hadn't been updated in ages?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah, she's just been sitting in front of the computer every day since then. I don't think the site has been updated."

name: Kimura
message: "How long has it been? There are lots of rumors going around that the site hasn't been updated for a while."

name: Master
message: "Why are there rumors about that?"

name: Kimura
message: "Well, the site looks like it's operating automatically, and apparently the predictions actually come true..."

name: Master
message: "Really?"

name: Hasaki
message: "No... I wonder... I think it uses a program..."

name: Kimura
message: "What? So it uses a program to predict the future?"

name: Hasaki
message: "I wouldn't really say it predicts the future..."

name: Kimura
message: "Does that mean a program is writing those predictions?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Well... According to Yuki-san, it takes trending keywords on the Internet and uses those to write the predictions."

name: Kimura
message: "Huh? What do you mean?"

name: Hasaki
message: "It's writing predictions for things that already happened."

name: Kimura
message: "What good is that?!"

name: Hasaki
message: "It's in beta right now. All it can do right now is take popular keywords and post them as predictions."

name: Kimura
message: "How can you call that a prediction?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Um... From what I've heard, the time required to post the predictions will grow shorter and shorter, and ultimately it will be able to post the predictions before anyone else on the Internet mentions it."

name: Kimura
message: "That's ridiculous."

name: Hasaki
message: "Really? At first it took several days to post a prediction, but now it can post them within seconds."

name: Hasaki
message: "That's why she said it would overtake the future soon."

name: Kimura
message: "It won't, though..."

name: Master
message: "Don't you think it's pretty impressive, though?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah, Yuki-san spent a lot of time on it when she was bored. Apparently, it's really close to overtaking the future."

name: Kimura
message: "I told you, that's not the problem here..."

name: Kimura
message: "I started researching the Web Bot Project on the Internet, and it's supposed to be way more than just that."

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah, Yuki-san said something like that."

name: Hasaki
message: "She said occult stuff like the Web Bot Project was impossible."

name: Hasaki
message: "She said it wasn't a problem of just improving the system, but that the theory itself is flawed... That's why she said it was just a superstition."

name: Master
message: "Haa... That sure sounds like Yuki, all right..."

name: Master
message: "She says it's impossible, but she was still too curious to pass up a chance to play around with it."

name: Master
message: "So that means Yuki is part of the problem here..."

name: Hasaki
message: "Ahaha... I guess so. Maybe we should delete the page."

name: Kimura
message: "No, I don't think you should. If you do, the only thing left behind will be the rumors about its predictions coming true."

name: Kimura
message: "If it's just making predictions after the fact, people will figure it out eventually."

name: Master
message: "I guess so... If we delete it, we won't have any proof that it's fake."

name: Kimura
message: "On the Internet, it just takes one piece of decisive evidence to prove something true or false, but..."

name: Master
message: "If there's no way to prove it either way, people will speculate about it for years."

name: Kimura
message: "Of course, most people on the Internet are just curious. It's not like they actually believe in prophecies, but still..."

name: Kimura
message: "The Web Bot Project website hasn't changed at all in the past few days."

name: Kimura
message: "Rather, the rumors on the Internet right now are all about the Web Bot Project's past predictions. If the system's predictions are what people are talking about on the Internet, then..."

name: Master
message: "There's no need to make a new prediction."

name: Kimura
message: "Though that'll change once something new crops up."

name: Hasaki
message: "Putting that aside, what do you mean by occult? I don't really know anything about that stuff..."

name: Master
message: "Well, that's..."

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh? N-No way... B-But..."

name: Kimura
message: "What? You must've made some crap up, old man... The occult isn't the kind of thing that would make a girl blush!"

name: Master
message: "Jeez, how can you tell? Maybe I should fix that dumb mouth of yours for good..."

name: Kimura
message: "Oh, no, don't mind me. Ahahaha."

name: Hasaki
message: "Either way, Yuki-san said that the system can't make a prediction right now."

name: Kimura
message: "But still, I'm really amazed that no one's figured it out... Though I have to say, I'm kinda skeptical that it could make those predictions in just a few seconds."

name: Master
message: "So what kind of rumors have there been about Kita High lately?"

name: Kimura
message: "The Web Bot Project has designated July 20th of this year as the date of a tragedy. It said those girls committed suicide in order to escape the disaster."

name: Hasaki
message: "They committed suicide in order to escape?"

name: Master
message: "If they were so afraid of dying, why would they commit suicide?"

name: Kimura
message: "Don't ask me. I just heard that those girls claimed the world would end on July 20th just before they committed suicide."

name: Hasaki
message: "Oh... So she..."

name: Master
message: "Did you know the girl who committed suicide, Hasaki-chan?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Oh, no. I wouldn't say that. I just met her once when I was with Tomo Nii-san and Yuki-san..."

name: Kimura
message: "You keep mentioning him, but who is Tomo Nii-san?"

name: Master
message: "Shut up, would you? You're not in a position to be asking questions."

name: Kimura
message: "I thought Takuji-kun was your only brother..."

name: Hasaki
message: "Takuji Nii-san isn't my only brother..."

name: Kimura
message: "What do you mean?"

name: Master
message: "I told you to shut up..."

name: Kimura
message: "Agh!"

name: Hasaki
message: "So are they talking about my brother on the Internet too?"

name: Kimura
message: "Hmm... Well, no one's mentioned him by name, but there are definitely rumors that something big is gonna happen at Kita High."

name: Kimura
message: "They say the ringleader is a male student from Kita High, but no outsiders have access to the underground message board, which is the epicenter of all the rumors."

name: Hasaki
message: "So that's... Takuji Nii-san..."

name: Master
message: "How much do they know about him?"

name: Kimura
message: "I'm not sure, but I realized it, so other people with good intuition might've noticed him too."

name: Master
message: "Is it true that people on the Internet can track down your address if they know your real name?"

name: Kimura
message: "I guess so? I couldn't say for sure, but it's certainly possible that they could find his address and phone number."

name: Master
message: "Do you think we're fine for now?"

name: Kimura
message: "Right now... Well, people are just trying to gather information without causing a fuss... But depending on what they find out, you might start getting unsolicited calls."

name: Hasaki
message: "Calls? You mean from people we don't know?"

name: Kimura
message: "Yeah, they do that on the Internet sometimes. They call businesses or famous people and post the conversations online.

name: Hasaki
message: "What for?"

name: Kimura
message: "Well, I guess some of them do it to get information, but most people just do it as a form of harassment."

name: Master
message: "You mean like when someone calls and immediately hangs up?"

name: Kimura
message: "Well, it's a bit different from that old prank. Usually, they record the call so they can post it online."

name: Master
message: "Huh... They must have a lot of free time."

name: Kimura
message: "Most people do it to kill time, after all."

name: Master
message: "They harass people just to kill time? There are an awful lot of terrible people in this country nowadays."

name: Kimura
message: "Well, there are laws against public indignation and the sort..."

name: Hasaki
message: "But we don't have a phone at our house. All we have is an Internet connection."

name: Kimura
message: "I think it's more common to call someone's school or work than their home."

name: Master
message: "So they could do it any time, couldn't they? They already know that he goes to Kita High, don't they?"

name: Kimura
message: "Like I said, people just seem to be investigating right now."

name: Master
message: "So it's just a matter of time until they find out where the Mamiya house is..."

name: Kimura
message: "Probably."

name: Master
message: "I see...
Okay, Hasaki-chan."

name: Hasaki
message: "Yes?"

name: Master
message: "From now on, you're staying here."

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh? B-But..."

name: Master
message: "Write down everything you need."

name: Kimura
message: "That might be a good idea. It might get a little noisy over at your house."

name: Master
message: "Yeah, so make this Kimura guy run and get whatever you need from the house."

name: Kimura
message: "Me?"

name: Master
message: "That's right. I guess you don't have to... if you don't care about your camera."

name: Kimura
message: "That's my beautiful fighting Nikon D3 Camera!"

name: Master
message: "Oh, this camera can fight? Maybe I should use it as a weapon next time I get a chance."

name: Kimura
message: "Wait, that's my heart and soul!"

name: Master
message: "Then I'll tear your heart out. You know, they used to call my fist the 10cm Bomb..."

name: Kimura
message: "What?! Are you some kind of mercenary boxer?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Maybe I was Youhei?"

name: Kimura
message: "Uh, wait, no one but old men are going to get that joke. Really, that wasn't funny at all."

name: Master
message: "I'm not an old man! I'm an old woman!"

name: Kimura
message: "Gughah!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Th-That's what you're mad about?"

name: Master
message: "And that last part was a parody of Dr. Narihara."

name: Kimura
message: "Y-You're crazy... Jeez..."

name: Kimura
message: "Eek! I-I'm here..."

name: Master
message: "What took so long?"

name: Kimura
message: "There was too much stuff. Are you moving in or what?"

name: Master
message: "Of course there's a lot. She's a girl, so she has to have her necessities."

name: Kimura
message: "But why does she need the entire dresser?!"

name: Master
message: "That's a dumb question! We can't let you touch her underwear, now can we?!"

name: Kimura
message: "Haa... So that's why."

name: Master
message: "Of course!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Ahaha... Sorry..."

name: Master
message: "The room upstairs is free."

name: Hasaki
message: "No, it's not. There's only your room up there."

name: Master
message: "I told you, you can have that room."

name: Hasaki
message: "What about you?"

name: Master
message: "I'll go sleep with my boyfriend."

name: Kimura
message: "Ahaha... It's kinda nasty hearing you say that."

name: Kimura
message: "Gughah!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Um, Master... If you don't mind, I'd like to sleep in the store."

name: Master
message: "No way. I can't let a girl sleep in a place like this."

name: Hasaki
message: "Really? I could sleep on the sofa in the back."

name: Master
message: "What are you talking about? You'll be sore and tired when you wake up."

name: Hasaki
message: "No, I won't. It's plenty big enough for me, so I won't notice at all, and besides..."

name: Master
message: "What?"

name: Hasaki
message: "If Tomo Nii-san or the old Yuki-san comes in, I want to be the first one to meet them."

name: Master
message: "Hasaki-chan..."

name: Hasaki
message: "Really, I would rather stay at home, but to be honest, it's really hard to watch Yuki-san when she treats me like that."

name: Hasaki
message: "So I really have to thank you for letting me stay here."

name: Master
message: "What? You could've asked any time."

name: Hasaki
message: "Sorry... but I didn't want to be selfish."

name: Master
message: "Silly girl."
Master gently embraced me.

name: Master
message: "You're the girl she gave her life to protect, so you're my daughter..."

name: Master
message: "And Tomosane is my son. Even now, she's protecting you both. I'm sure of that."

name: Master
message: "The doctor might disagree... Maybe most people would disagree..."

name: Master
message: "But... I believe. She protected you before, and now she's protecting Tomosane."

name: Master
message: "From all the curses... From all the ghosts..."

name: Hasaki
message: "Yes."
I hugged Master back.
Our father died, and our mother ended up like that... Ever since, it's been Master Minakami who's been looking out for me and my brother.
Maybe he's been spoiling me.
I cried into Master's chest.
I don't know why. I just needed to cry.
